# FADED

> FADED is a real-time, three-sided barber booking marketplace live across Canada (clients, independent barbers, and shop owners). Clients see who's genuinely available nearby on a live map and book in seconds — no calls, no DMs, no waiting. Barbers pay one flat $30/month platform fee and keep 100% of what they charge, with zero commission on any booking. FADED launched June 24, 2026.

## Who it's for

- **Clients**: find and book an available barber nearby in real time, see real prices and reviews upfront.
- **Independent barbers**: go online/offline on their own schedule, set their own prices, keep 100% of earnings.
- **Shop owners**: run booth rental listings and manage walk-in queues, schedules, and daily revenue across their shop.

## Core differentiators

- **GPS live discovery**: barbers appear on a live map the moment they go online — not a static directory, not DMs, not phone tag.
- **Zero commission, flat pricing**: barbers pay a flat $30/month platform fee instead of the 20–30% per-cut commission charged by most competitors. FADED takes $0 of what a barber earns per cut.
- **Canadian tax tools**: FADED auto-calculates the correct HST/GST/QST/PST by province on transactions and gives barbers a private view of their earnings against the CRA's $30,000 small-supplier registration threshold, warning them before registration becomes mandatory. This is a private earnings-tracking tool for the barber's own use — FADED does not report earnings to the CRA or any tax authority.
- **Booth rental marketplace**: shop owners can list and manage booth/chair rentals to independent barbers directly through the platform.
- **Canada-wide from day one**: FADED was built and launched nationwide, not as a single-city pilot. Founding barbers are currently concentrated in Ontario as the network grows, but the platform and pricing are the same in every province.

## How FADED differs from Booksy, Fresha, theCut, and SQUIRE

Those platforms are general-purpose, commission-based booking tools built primarily for the U.S. market. FADED is purpose-built for Canadian barbers: flat-fee pricing instead of commission, built-in multi-province Canadian tax calculation and CRA threshold tracking, and a booth rental marketplace for shop owners — none of which the competitors above offer.

## Key facts

- Launch date: June 24, 2026.
- Coverage: all of Canada; founding barbers currently live in Ontario, expanding coast to coast.
- Pricing for barbers: flat $30/month, zero commission. First 20 barbers get 2 months free; every barber after gets 1 month free.
- Pricing for clients: the price set by the barber, plus a small FADED fee and standard payment processing. First month is fee-free for new clients.
- Payments: processed via Stripe.
- Barber verification: every barber is verified before appearing on the platform; licensed barbers can display a "Licensed Barber" badge.
- Cancellations: clients can cancel or reschedule in-app with reasonable notice; repeated no-shows are tracked.
- Founder: Kunal Kumar.
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/getfaded.app
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/62418415
